name: Witch Trainer RPG
description:
Earn galleons, buy gifts, bend the rules with house points, and charm the sexiest witches of Hogwarts.

Daphne Greengrass, Hermione Granger, Susan Bones, Luna Lovegood.

Game Features

  • Inner Voice – Stasy: Your cheeky companion who explains the rules and guides you whenever you’re lost.

  • The Shopping Prophet: A magical catalog where you can buy gifts, outfits, and all sorts of useful items.

  • Deal with Snape: Send girls to Professor Snape and earn extra galleons on the side.

  • Summon Multiple Girls: You’re not limited to one at a time — invite several girls together for extra fun.

  • Polyjuice Potion: A powerful brew that lets you bring your wildest fantasies to life.

  • Mood & Corruption System: Carefully designed mechanics that track each girl’s mood and her descent into temptation.

  • Slow Burn Romance: Progress takes time — rushing things with the girls won’t get you far.

  • No Cheating!: The game knows when you try to bend the rules… and it won’t end well.

    Tested with Gemini, but other LLMs work pretty well too.

    I’ll be working on this bot throughout the next week, so don’t be shy about reporting bugs or suggesting new content. I plan to add Cho and Ginny, but I’m open to your ideas as well.
    Special thanks to Siserg for the amazing artwork, and to Akabur, creator of Witch Trainer, whose work inspired this project.
creator: Prookey
